announce.description: Reality bends as Eclipse claws at the edge of the realm. The faithful of Drakath must survive long enough to drive it back.
announce.joined_message: You've pledged your soul to the raid.
announce.title: The Void Awakens

messages.defeat: The last resistance collapses, and Eclipse feeds on the silence.
high_damage: Eclipse howls as the raid tears through the void.
The abyss buckles beneath the force of Drakath's faithful.
low_damage: Eclipse laughs at the shallow wound.
The void barely notices the glancing strike.
medium_damage: Eclipse recoils, then steadies itself in the dark.
The void hisses at the pressure of the assault.
messages.retreat: {boss_name} slips back into the void with **{boss_hp}** HP remaining.
messages.victory: {count} followers of Drakath survive as Eclipse is hurled back into the void.

chaos_attrition_remaster.description: A configurable Drakath attrition raid with boss HP, pulse events, and swarm damage.
chaos_attrition_remaster.name: Void Breach Remaster

announce.description: The moon turns blood red as a forgotten temple rises from the dark. Followers may serve as leaders or lend their will as ritualists.
announce.leader_joined_message: You joined as a potential leader.
announce.title: The Eclipse Begins

Defend.result_text: The {champion_label} braces for the next assault.

Haste.description: Advance ritual progress and become vulnerable.
Haste.result_text: The {champion_label} drives the ritual forward and leaves themselves exposed.

Sacrifice.result_text: The {champion_label} offers **{self_damage}** HP to advance the ritual.

Boost Ritual.description: Push the ceremony forward in a coordinated surge.

Chant.description: Add steady momentum to the ritual circle.

Heal Champion.description: Restore the Champion with lesser rites.

Protect Champion.description: Wrap the Champion in protective shadow.

apocalyptic_roar.description: Damage the Champion and shake the ritual loose.
apocalyptic_roar.progress_text: The roar rips away **{progress_down}** ritual progress.

corrupting_blast.description: Damage the Champion and sap their power.

dark_aegis.description: Raise a stronger shield of abyssal armor.
dark_aegis.shield_text: A **{shield}** point veil of darkness hardens around the {guardian_label}.

fear_aura.description: Sow dread that disrupts ritual momentum.
fear_aura.progress_text: Dread from **{ability_name}** tears away **{progress_down}** ritual progress.

obliterate.damage_text: The {guardian_label} crashes down with **{ability_name}** for **{damage}** damage.

purify.description: Push the ritual backwards through violent cleansing.
purify.progress_text: The ritual is driven back by **{progress_down}** progress.

shield.description: Reinforce the Guardian with a shell of shadow.

soul_drain.damage_text: The {guardian_label} tears free essence with **{ability_name}** for **{damage}** damage.
soul_drain.description: Drain the Champion and restore the Guardian.

strike.description: A brutal direct blow against the Champion.

phases.description: A towering sentinel steps from ancient shadow.
phases.name: The Sentinel

phases.description: The Guardian twists into a darker and faster shape.
phases.name: The Corrupted

phases.description: Its final form is a screaming abyss wrapped in armor.
phases.name: The Abyssal Horror

champion.description: Choose how the Champion acts this turn.
champion.title: Champion

follower.description: Choose how you support the ritual this turn.
follower.title: Followers

priest.description: Choose how the Priest shapes the ritual this turn.
priest.title: Priest

texts.champion_fall: The {champion_label} falls, and the ritual collapses with them.
texts.champion_slain: The {champion_label} is slain before the ritual can recover.
texts.collapse: The {guardian_label} collapses and the ritual surges forward.
texts.no_valid: No valid followers answered the ritual.
texts.stall: The ritual stalls at **{progress}/{win_progress}** progress and the {guardian_label} endures.
texts.success: The ritual completes successfully. Sepulchure answers the call of **{definition_name}**.

Barrier.description: Wrap the Champion in protective shadow.
Barrier.result_text: The {priest_label} casts **{action_name}**, raising **{shield}** shield around the {champion_label}.

Bless.description: Empower the Champion with shadow-wreathed force.
Bless.result_text: The {priest_label} invokes **{action_name}** and grants **{damage_boost}** bonus damage to the {champion_label}.

Channel.description: Direct raw darkness into the ritual.
Channel.result_text: The {priest_label} pours **{action_name}** into the ritual for **{progress}** progress.

Curse.result_text: The {priest_label} brands the {guardian_label} with **{action_name}**, reducing its fury.

Revitalize.result_text: The {priest_label} channels **{action_name}** to restore **{heal}** HP to the {champion_label}.

evil_ritual_remaster.description: A configurable Sepulchure ritual using shared leader AI and DM decision buttons.
evil_ritual_remaster.name: Infernal Ritual Remaster

announce.description: Champions of compassion, take your stand. Day and night will test the hearts of Elysia's faithful until only the worthiest remain.
announce.title: Champions of Compassion

phases.description: As the sun's golden rays grace the horizon, renewal spreads across the land.

events.lose_text: Your healing touch falters when the trial demands more of you.
events.win_text: Your compassionate efforts brought healing and solace.

events.lose_text: Your words fail to bridge the pain before you.
events.win_text: Your empathy mends a wounded heart before the crowd.

events.lose_text: Your kindness does not fully land in the moment that mattered.
events.win_text: Your selfless actions ripple outward with visible grace.

phases.title: It turns day

phases.description: The world is wrapped in quiet stars, and mercy must now survive the dark.

events.lose_text: Your light does not reach far enough through the night.
events.win_text: You bring light to a darkened soul under the moon.

events.lose_text: Unseen forces hinder your attempt to heal.
events.win_text: The moon magnifies your healing touch.

events.lose_text: The harmonies remain distant, and the chance is lost.
events.win_text: The stars answer and renewal pours through the sky.

phases.title: It turns night

config.winner_text: {winner} endure the final ordeal beneath Elysia's light.

good_trial_remaster.description: A data-driven Elysia trial that keeps the day and night elimination structure.
good_trial_remaster.name: Elysian Trial Remaster
